Funnels & Conversion Rate Optimization

Capture and nurture leadsthen keep testing what converts.

The full conversion path: opt-in pages, lead magnets, email nurture, retargeting, and A/B testing. Built and kept under test as one connected system from first click to booked call.

Build My Conversion SystemView Our Work

A landing page is not a funnel

Traffic without follow-up and testing is expensive waste. Most businesses lose leads between form fill and booking, and never run the tests that would show them why.

  • Leads opt in and hear nothing beyond a generic thank-you page.
  • Landing pages convert at 1 to 2% because the message does not match the ad or offer.
  • Changes happen by guesswork because no one set up a testing framework.
  • Retargeting and nurture stop early, so unconverted visitors disappear.

One system: capture, nurture, test, convert

  • Funnel architecture mapped to your offer, audience, and sales cycle length.
  • Landing pages with lead magnets and thank-you flows that qualify intent.
  • Multi-step email and SMS sequences with behavioral triggers and booking CTAs.
  • CRO program with heatmaps, session recordings, and statistically valid A/B tests.

Proof it works

Trust signals from real client work, not vanity metrics.

Case Study

SaaS Platform

Paid traffic landed on the homepage. Leads got one welcome email then went cold. Demo booking rate was 2.1% with no nurture sequence, retargeting, or A/B testing on the booking flow.

5.9× demo growth after funnel rebuild with dedicated landing pages, a 7-email nurture sequence, retargeting pools, and structured tests on pricing and demo booking pages.

Read the full case study

Why Most Conversion Systems Leak Revenue

Stage gaps between traffic and sales, pages built on gut feel, and funnels left alone after launch day.

Cold Traffic100%
Landing Page64%
Lead Captured12%
Email Nurture9%
Call Booked3.2%
Deal Closed1.8%
Visitors → Leads → Customers
Conversion Funnel
CVR
1.8%
01

Issue 01

Gaps between funnel stages

Traffic arrives but nurture stops at the form fill. Nobody tracks where leads drop between stages.

02

Issue 02

Pages built without data

Landing pages launch on gut feel. No heatmaps, no session recordings, no tests to validate the layout.

03

Issue 03

Manual handoffs and blind spots

Sales gets cold leads because automation ends at submit. Marketing never sees what happens after handoff.

04

Issue 04

One-and-done mentality

Funnels get built once and left alone. CRO treated as a project instead of a monthly discipline.

Lead Flow Simulator

Watch how traffic moves through your funnel. Each stage has a conversion rate that determines final output.

Automation paths that run 24/7.

Every trigger, action, and condition is mapped so your funnel runs without manual intervention.

New Lead Captured

Send welcome email → Add to segment → Notify sales → Schedule follow-up

Instant

Email Opened (3x)

Move to warm segment → Send case study → Add retargeting pixel

24h after 3rd open

Booked Call

Send confirmation → Send prep kit → Add to closed segment → Trigger SMS reminder

Instant

No Open (7 days)

Change subject line → Resend → If still no open → Move to re-engagement sequence

Day 7

Funnel components.

Every piece of a high-converting funnel system, designed to work together.

Lead Magnets

Valuable assets that capture emails from cold traffic

Active

Landing Pages

Conversion-optimized pages matched to ad traffic

Active

Email Sequences

Multi-step automation that nurtures leads to booking

Active

CRM Pathways

Lead scoring, routing, and qualification logic

Active

SMS Triggers

Time-sensitive text messages for appointment booking funnels

Active

Retargeting Flows

Re-engagement campaigns that pull unconverted leads back into the funnel

Active

A/B Test Results Tracker

Every test is documented with sample size, significance level, and real conversion impact.

Form Fields

4 fields vs. 7 fields

+42%

Social Proof Block

Reviews above fold vs. below form

+31%

CTA Button Copy

Book a free estimate vs. Contact us

+23%

Headline A/B

Benefit-driven vs. feature

+18%

Small wins add up.

Compounding improvements is how CRO creates durable revenue growth. A 15% lift applied to a refined funnel, then tested again, produces results that outpace any single redesign or campaign launch.

Conversion Lift per Test

Average across all tests

+15%

Simultaneous Tests

Running at any given time

4

Test Win Rate

Percentage of winning tests

72%

Revenue Lift

Avg. across winning test implementations

+31%

The scientific method applied to conversion.

Every change we make starts with a hypothesis grounded in real user data, not assumptions. We run controlled experiments, wait for statistical significance, and implement only the variations that hold up under scrutiny.

Collect Data

Heatmaps, session recordings, and analytics to establish baselines from both numbers and user behavior

Generate Hypotheses

Every test starts with a hypothesis rooted in real data, not guesses

Run Experiments

A/B tests and multivariate tests deployed on proven testing tools

Analyze Results

Statistical significance checks so we don't call a winner too early

Implement & Iterate

Winning variations deployed. Roadmap updated with fresh insights

Build process.

From strategy to live, every funnel follows a proven build sequence.

  1. Phase 1

    Funnel Mapping

    Full customer journey mapped, from traffic source to booked call.

    End-to-end journey mapped in week 1

  2. Phase 2

    Landing Page Build

    High-converting pages with lead magnets that capture emails.

    Avg. 12% landing page conversion rate

  3. Phase 3

    Email & SMS Setup

    Multi-step sequences with segmentation and urgency triggers.

    5+ automated nurture sequences

  4. Phase 4

    CRM Integration

    Lead scoring, routing rules, and sales notification workflows.

    Leads routed in under 60 seconds

  5. Phase 5

    Analytics & Optimize

    Every funnel stage tracked. Conversion rate optimized continuously.

    18% month-over-month funnel growth

What you get with funnels and CRO

Every stage of the conversion path. Built, connected, and kept under test until the numbers move.

Scope of work

  • Funnel Strategy and Architecture

    Funnel map, offer positioning, audience targeting, and conversion path from ad click to sale.

  • Landing Pages and Lead Magnets

    Opt-in page design, lead magnet creation, thank-you pages, and CRO-ready copy and structure.

  • Email and SMS Automation

    5 to 10 step nurture sequences with segmentation, triggers, and booking or purchase CTAs.

  • Conversion Audit and Heatmap Analysis

    Analytics review, funnel drop-off analysis, heatmaps, and session recordings with prioritized fix list.

  • A/B and Multivariate Testing

    Hypothesis-driven experiments on headlines, CTAs, forms, layouts, and offers with significance gates.

  • Retargeting, CRM Integration, and Tracking

    Pixel audiences, form-to-CRM routing, and end-to-end conversion tracking at every funnel stage.

Results we track

Funnel and CRO outcomes from recent programs.

1.8% → 8.4%

conversion rate · Landscaping Co. funnel

5.9X

demo requests · SaaS Platform, 8 mo

+35%

nurture-to-booking rate · post-automation

Transparent Pricing

See what's included at each tier.

Fixed scope. No surprise fees on the invoice.

See Pricing
Common Questions

FAQ

What platforms do you build funnels on?>

We work with your existing stack: GoHighLevel, HubSpot, ActiveCampaign, Klaviyo, ClickFunnels, and others. If you don't have a platform, we'll recommend the best fit for your business model and set it up from scratch.

How quickly can a funnel go live?>

A standard lead capture and nurture funnel can launch in 2–4 weeks. More complex automations with CRM integration, SMS, and multi-stage sequences take 4–6 weeks. We give you a clear timeline after the strategy call.

Do I need a CRM to use your funnel service?>

Ideally yes, but if you don't have one, we can set up a lightweight CRM as part of the build. We integrate lead routing, scoring, and notifications so your sales team knows exactly when and how to follow up with each lead.

What is the typical landing page conversion rate?>

Our landing pages average 12% conversion from cold traffic. Warm traffic from email or retargeting typically converts at 20–35%. We optimize headline, CTA, form length, and social proof to squeeze each percentage point.

How do you measure funnel performance?>

Cost per lead, booking rate, email open and click rates, and revenue per contact. We set up tracking at every stage of the funnel so you can see exactly where leads are progressing and where they're leaking.

How do you decide what to test?>

Every test starts with data. We review heatmaps, session recordings, analytics, and on-site behavior to find where visitors are dropping off or hesitating. Tests are hypotheses backed by real evidence, not guesses.

How long does a test run?>

Tests run until they reach 95%+ statistical significance, which typically takes 2–4 weeks depending on traffic volume. We never call a winner early. That's how you end up implementing changes that hurt performance.

What kind of conversion lift can I expect?>

Our clients see an average 15–23% conversion lift per winning test. Results compound over time. A 15% lift on top of another 15% lift adds up significantly across a quarter of testing.

Do I need a lot of traffic for CRO to work?>

You need enough traffic to reach statistical significance in a reasonable time. Generally, we recommend at least 500 monthly goal completions before starting a testing program. If you're below that, we focus on qualitative research first.

What pages do you prioritize for testing?>

High-traffic pages with clear conversion goals: your homepage, service or product pages, pricing pages, and checkout flows. We identify the pages where a conversion rate lift will have the biggest revenue impact and start there.

How much does a funnels and CRO program cost?>

Single funnel builds with landing page, lead magnet, and email sequence start at $5,000. Complex multi-offer systems run $10,000 to $30,000. Ongoing CRO programs start at $2,500 per month when you have enough traffic for meaningful tests.

Do I need a funnel build and CRO at the same time?>

Not always. If you already have traffic, we can start with a CRO audit and testing. If you are launching from scratch, we build the system and optimize from day one so you never go live blind.

How long before we see conversion lift?>

Funnel builds launch in 4 to 8 weeks. A/B tests usually reach significance in 2 to 4 weeks depending on traffic. Most clients see measurable lift within the first 60 to 90 days of optimization.

How much traffic do I need for A/B testing?>

About 1,000 monthly sessions on pages being tested. Lower-traffic funnels still benefit from audit-driven UX fixes, heatmap insights, and qualitative research before formal tests.

Can you connect funnels to our CRM?>

Yes. We integrate with HubSpot, Salesforce, ActiveCampaign, GoHighLevel, and most CRMs. Leads flow automatically with source tags, and sales gets notified when scoring thresholds are hit.
